name: Prompt & Pursuit
description: Step into the world of CRM innovation where strategy meets automation! Prompt & Pursuit challenges teams to solve real-time business problems using data, AI logic, and workflow design. From building digital CRM blueprints to pitching in a Shark Tank style finale with a surprise crisis twist, this event is where future business technologists rise.

name: Quiz O'Clock
description: Stay ahead of the curve with Quiz O'Clock, a fast-paced trivia event covering the latest breakthroughs in Engineering and IT. We bridge the gap between core programming and modern tech current affairs. Whether it's legacy code or next-gen innovation, show us you have the engineering mindset to win.

name: Tech Tambola
description: Tech Tambola is an interactive, knowledge-based twist on the traditional tambola game designed for engineering and technology enthusiasts. Instead of numbers, participants mark technical and general science concepts based on clue-based calls. The event combines awareness, quick thinking, and strategy to create an engaging and competitive experience.

gamingEvents.name: FREE FIRE MAX
gamingEvents.description: Step into the ultimate survival battleground where strategy, reflexes, and skill decide the champion. Land on the island, loot weapons, and outlast your opponents in fast-paced combat as the safe zone closes in. Adapt quickly and prove your dominance.

gamingEvents.name: VALORANT
gamingEvents.description: Valorant is an online multiplayer computer game, produced by Riot Games. It is a first-person shooter game, consisting of two teams of five, where one team attacks and the other defends. Players control characters known as 'agents', who all have different abilities to use during gameplay.

gamingEvents.name: CHESSFRENZY
gamingEvents.description: Chessfrenzy is a fast-paced chess showdown blending strategy, speed, and blitz tactics for ultimate brain gamers. Battle through intense rounds, outsmart opponents, and claim chessboard glory. Ideal for tacticians ready to unleash their inner grandmaster!
